title: briza calotheca
intro: Briza calotheca, also known as Calamagrostis, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Briza calotheca include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Briza calotheca can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
